name: Dr Bian

skills.name: Malicious Practice
skills.description: Damage from skills and Basic Attacks places up to 5 marks on enemies each stack dealing damage over time.Chemist's Skill 2 and Ultimate grant up to 5 marks to himself and histeammates, continually restoring Health with each stack.

skills.name: Deadly Panacea
skills.description: Throws a vial of deadly poison at the target location, dealing damage overtime and slowing enemies within range.Deadly Panacea: Can store up to three vials.

skills.name: Fatal Diagnosis
skills.description: Launches a concoction in the target direction that deals damage to enemiesin its path and marks them.Restores Chemist and his allies' Health and marks them.

skills.name: Master of Life
skills.description: Damages enemies within range and heals teammatesEvery mark detonated will increase damage and healing.He recovers extra Health.

tips: Dr Bian (Mage): Tier B on international ranked — 50.11% WR.
Build core: Spell Tome, Boots of the Arcane, Holy Grail.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.11%, pick 0.64%, ban 0.11%, popularity tier B.
Counters Mai Shiranui, Diaochan · Weak into Yang Jian.

faqs.question: Is Dr Bian good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dr Bian is Tier B Mage with 50.11% win rate, 0.64% pick rate, and 0.11% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Dr Bian build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Spell Tome, Boots of the Arcane, Holy Grail, Venomous Staff, Savant's Wrath, Sage's Sanctuary. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Dr Bian?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Dr Bian: Yang Jian. Dr Bian is strong into Mai Shiranui, Diaochan.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Diaochan. Countered by: Yang Jian.
